scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @claudio/core && npm run build -w @claudio/server && npm run build:web
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build -w @claudio/core && npm run build -w @claudio/server && npm run build:web:desktop && npm run desktop:prepare && electron-builder --config apps/desktop/electron-builder.mjs --dir
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build -w @claudio/core && npm run build -w @claudio/server && npm run build:web:desktop && npm run desktop:prepare && electron-builder --config apps/desktop/electron-builder.mjs
